summary: The concept of "sparrow foot marks" has no established forensic basis in medical or automotive trauma documentation; it is not recognized in available scientific resources related to post-accident victim identification. As such, reliance on this marker fails clinically because there’s zero support from credible studies or standard practices used in vehicular collisions investigations.
